race.comment: SUGARFIRE (9) improving mare with her hoof on the till. Taken to the front with a tenacious third over 1500m at this track in a solid rating contest. Hard to beat in this suitable race despite drawing out. COURSE OF ACTION (4) bounced off his good debut second with a slashing Maiden victory over 1400m at Taree when coming from near last last on the turn. Can keep the winning momentum going in this stronger contest. JASON DARREN (3) win record hardly excites but comes here in good order. Tried hard with the 57kg when a game on-pace fifth over 1400m at Tamworth on April 24. Will roll along and give a ton of cheek. HARRY'S BOY (5) improving gelding who overcame the wide gate at his second race start with a narrow victory over 1300m at Scone. On the up and ready for this trip. Each way.
